meta.intent: Vary the dock discipline band by asking the player to prefer clean triples and low-remainder route clears while still chasing a lower rescue first.
meta.expectedPath: Take the lower C triple to open the urgent edge puppy with no dock cost, then use the compact C route near the upper puppy and small stabilizing clears instead of the tempting broad groups.
meta.expectedFailMode: The player takes tempting 4- and 5-sized groups, fills the dock with residue, and has to spend rescue tempo repairing the dock.
meta.whatItProves: Dock residue can be a readable rescue-route decision rather than a separate rack puzzle.
meta.notes: Role: variation. Empty cells are limited to the flooded bottom row; active board density stays high while the lower edge target creates the water-facing priority.
